summary: Tested restaurant state clearing when switching between restaurants (689 ↔ 478). Critical functionality is not working - cart items and states persist across restaurant changes instead of being cleared.

integration_issues.issue: Cart items persist across restaurant changes instead of being cleared
integration_issues.details: When switching from restaurant 689 to 478 and back, the cart item '50-50 Paan' reappears, indicating cart state is not properly cleared

integration_issues.issue: useEffect hooks for state clearing are not firing when restaurant ID changes
integration_issues.details: No console logs found for 'Restaurant changed from X to Y - cleared all cart state' or 'cleared all form states' despite URL navigation working correctly

passed_tests: URL parsing correctly extracts restaurant ID from path (689, 478)
Navigation between restaurant URLs works correctly
Cart UI displays items when present
Review order page redirects to menu when cart is empty (expected behavior)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Restaurant state clearing is completely non-functional. The useEffect hooks in CartContext.js (lines 159-180) and ReviewOrder.jsx (lines 264-295) are not firing when restaurant ID changes via URL navigation. This violates the core requirement that users should have clean state when switching restaurants. Root cause analysis needed for why restaurant ID comparison is failing.

success_percentage.frontend: 25% - Basic navigation works but core state clearing functionality fails
